objective: Import MANUAL_SCOUT_PASS_001 into materials/MATERIAL_CATALOG.json as non-trusted controlled catalog entries without installing, fetching, scanning, quarantining, or admitting materials.
human_meaning: Builder records the manually scouted materials as candidates only. Importing is not trust, approval, installation, or use.
forbidden: Do not modify PHASE79 runtime proof or report files.
validation: Seed validation must pass before runtime.
Runtime import must produce exactly nine non-TRUSTED catalog entries unless duplicates are explicitly skipped with proof.
Completed validation must prove report PASS, proof PASS, queue NONE, and trusted count zero.
